ec2.trafficmirrortarget.Description.Docs: The description of the Traffic Mirror target.

ec2.trafficmirrortarget.NetworkInterface.Docs: The network interface ID that is associated with the target.

ec2.trafficmirrortarget.NetworkLoadBalan.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Network Load Balancer that is associated with the target.

ec2.trafficmirrortarget.Tags.Docs: The tags to assign to the Traffic Mirror target.
